name: reviw
description: Lightweight file reviewer with in-browser comments for CSV, TSV, Markdown, and Git diffs.

scripts.test:v2: cd v2 && moon test --target js && moon build --target js --release && node e2e/smoke.mjs && node e2e/media_sidebar_regression.mjs && node e2e/preview_interaction_regression.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run build && mkdir -p dist/server dist/ui && echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' > dist/server/server.js && cat v2/_build/js/release/build/server/server.js >> dist/server/server.js && chmod +x dist/server/server.js && cp v2/_build/js/release/build/ui/ui.js dist/ui/

author: kazuph
